$canonical: Canonical string CONTENT lives in app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml (base/en) + values-<locale>/strings.xml. This schema documents the key convention, locale set, and rules that code/PRs must follow. If a key's value differs, the resource XML wins.

violations.legacyDuplicates: Many keys exist BOTH text_-prefixed and unprefixed (text_welcome + welcome, text_action_sign_in + action_sign_in). Canonical = text_. Delete unprefixed dupes (ADR-009).
violations.autoGenerated: Some keys are the full English sentence (very long). Should be renamed to intent-based keys.

locales.$count: 18 files = base(en) + 17 translated (~99% complete each, ~8 keys behind base)

issues.kr: NON-STANDARD: Android Korean is 'ko'. values-kr will NOT resolve on a Korean device. Rename values-kr -> values-ko (ADR-010).
issues.he_iw: BOTH values-he (1153) and values-iw (1144) present. LocaleHelper.kt:13 normalizes he->iw at runtime, making values-he partly redundant. Consolidate (ADR-010).
issues.rtl: ar, he/iw are RTL — drawable-ldrtl-* mirroring exists.

wrapper: com.noise.audio.utils.LocaleHelper (setLocale/onAttach/getSystemDefaultLanguage); selected lang in MyApplication.userLanguage; wired via attachBaseContext.

hardcodedCopyViolations.$baseline: ~15-18 user-facing literals NOT using string resources (should be ~0). App is otherwise resource-driven (861 getString + 22 stringResource).
